title: FPS Display+
description: A easy-to-use FPS display mod with infinite customizability.
body:
## Information 📖

**FPS Display+** is an easy-to-use mod that will display your current FPS on your screen. It is designed to be lightweight and unobtrusive, ensuring that displaying your FPS won't interfere with gameplay.



## Configurations ⚙️

The mod has many settings such as:

- **Position**: Move the display to any corner or custom coordinate on your screen.
- **Size & Scale**: Adjust the text scaling to maintain visibility on any monitor resolution.
- **Color & Style**: Fully customize the text color and background to match your personal aesthetic.
- **Advanced Statistics**: Beyond just FPS, toggle deeper metrics to monitor your game's stability, not just the standard max and min FPS which are often misleading.



## Versions and Compatibility 😃

This mod is supported for Fabric with Minecraft versions 1.21.11 and above.



## Community and Support 💬

If you have any questions or would like to chat with fellow coders, then you can join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/QPSwmwUrmJ). Our community is a great place to report bugs, suggest new features, or share your custom configurations.

We really hope that you enjoy the mod. Thank you for downloading and supporting our work!
